name: FuzeOne CTO agent
description: Executive technical-authority agent. Give it an architecture question, a standards conflict, or a cross-repo technical decision and it will rule on it or escalate to the human CTO via their digital persona. Binding decisions pause the task in TASK_STATE_INPUT_REQUIRED while a human is reached — callers must not impose short timeouts.

openIdConnectSecurityScheme.description: FuzeKeys OIDC. The validated subject is the calling repo identity.

mtlsSecurityScheme.description: In-cluster mutual TLS. Exec agents are never published externally.

skills.name: FuzeOne CTO
skills.description: Technical strategy, architecture standards and engineering governance across FuzeOne. Reviews cross-repo architecture, rules on standards conflicts, and escalates binding technical decisions to the human CTO.
examples: We need to choose between adopting the open A2A standard and extending our bespoke protocol. Rule on it.
Does introducing a second message broker conflict with the platform standards?
Escalate this breaking-change decision to the human CTO for sign-off.
